message:
♻️ refactor(phase4.5a): migrate /api/mcp card reads to kc-agent (#7993) (#8171)

Phase 4.5a of the pod-SA -> kc-agent refactor: migrate the frontend's
read-only /api/mcp/* callers in cards and drilldown hooks to kc-agent
at LOCAL_AGENT_HTTP_URL. Every swap is a URL change; no backend handler
is deleted in this PR (that happens in Phase 4.5c once every consumer
is migrated). The effect is that the data each card displays is now
scoped to what the user's own kubeconfig can see, not what the backend
pod ServiceAccount can see.

32 call sites across 17 files:

  web/src/components/cards/crio_status/useCrioStatus.ts           (3)
  web/src/components/cards/failover_timeline/useFailoverTimeline.ts (1)
  web/src/components/cards/flatcar_status/useFlatcarStatus.ts     (1)
  web/src/components/cards/fluentd_status/useFluentdStatus.ts     (4)
  web/src/components/cards/karmada_status/useKarmadaStatus.ts     (3)
  web/src/components/cards/keda_status/useKedaStatus.ts           (3)
  web/src/components/cards/kubevela_status/useKubeVelaStatus.ts   (2)
  web/src/components/cards/lima_status/useLimaStatus.ts           (1)
  web/src/components/cards/multi-tenancy/k3s-status/useK3sStatus.ts       (1)
  web/src/components/cards/multi-tenancy/kubeflex-status/useKubeflexStatus.ts (1)
  web/src/components/cards/multi-tenancy/kubevirt-status/useKubevirtStatus.ts (1)
  web/src/components/cards/multi-tenancy/ovn-status/useOvnStatus.ts       (1)
  web/src/components/cards/multi-tenancy/tenant-topology/useNetworkStats.ts (1)
  web/src/components/cards/openfeature_status/useOpenFeatureStatus.ts     (2)
  web/src/components/cards/openkruise_status/useOpenKruiseStatus.ts (2)
  web/src/components/cards/strimzi_status/useStrimziStatus.ts     (2)
  web/src/components/cards/trino_gateway/useTrinoGateway.ts       (3)

Each site's single-quoted '/api/mcp/X' (or backtick
`/api/mcp/X?${params}`) is replaced with `${LOCAL_AGENT_HTTP_URL}/X`
template literal form. Files with a pre-existing multi-line
`import { FETCH_DEFAULT_TIMEOUT_MS } from '../.../lib/constants/network'`
got LOCAL_AGENT_HTTP_URL folded into the same import destructure.

All other behaviour is preserved — the fetch method, timeout, headers,
and query-string shape are unchanged. kc-agent already serves the
matching read routes (/pods, /deployments, /events, /nodes, /gpu-nodes,
/custom-resources, /daemonsets, /pod-network-stats, etc.) from Phase 0
of the refactor; this PR simply points the frontend at them.

Refs #7993.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -9,7 +9,7 @@
 import { useCache } from '../../../lib/cache'
 import { useCardLoadingState } from '../CardDataContext'
 import { authFetch } from '../../../lib/api'
-import { FETCH_DEFAULT_TIMEOUT_MS } from '../../../lib/constants/network'
+import { FETCH_DEFAULT_TIMEOUT_MS, LOCAL_AGENT_HTTP_URL } from '../../../lib/constants/network'
 import {
   TRINO_GATEWAY_DEMO_DATA,
   type TrinoGatewayData,
@@ -192,9 +192,9 @@ function aggregateGateways(
 
 async function fetchTrinoGatewayData(): Promise<TrinoGatewayData> {
   const [coordinators, workers, gatewayPods] = await Promise.all([
-    fetchPods(`/api/mcp/pods?labelSelector=${LABEL_TRINO_COORDINATOR}`),
-    fetchPods(`/api/mcp/pods?labelSelector=${LABEL_TRINO_WORKER}`),
-    fetchPods(`/api/mcp/pods?labelSelector=${LABEL_TRINO_GATEWAY}`),
+    fetchPods(`${LOCAL_AGENT_HTTP_URL}/pods?labelSelector=${LABEL_TRINO_COORDINATOR}`),
+    fetchPods(`${LOCAL_AGENT_HTTP_URL}/pods?labelSelector=${LABEL_TRINO_WORKER}`),
+    fetchPods(`${LOCAL_AGENT_HTTP_URL}/pods?labelSelector=${LABEL_TRINO_GATEWAY}`),
   ])
 
   const detected = coordinators.length > 0 || workers.length > 0 || gatewayPods.length > 0
